heroSection.heading: The future
heroSection.subtitle: Educational and Research Institute of Cybernetics, Information Technologies and Engineering, NUWM

entrantCta.heading: Ready to start your
entrantCta.description: Apply to NUWM right now and choose the program that matches your ambitions.

advantages.title: Education aligned with the job market
advantages.desc: Programs developed together with SoftServe, EPAM and GlobalLogic. Real projects, current tech stack and industry practitioners as lecturers.

advantages.title: Study abroad with Erasmus+
advantages.desc: Partnerships with universities in Poland, Czech Republic, Lithuania and 15 more EU countries. Grants cover accommodation, relocation and tuition.

advantages.title: Internships from year one or two
advantages.desc: Partner companies invite students to paid internships. Most graduates already have a job offer before their thesis defence.

advantages.title: University founded in 1922
advantages.desc: Over 100 years of academic tradition, 29,000 graduates worldwide and a consistent Top-44 ranking among Ukrainian universities.
